user_message: Review docs/brainstorms/v0-6-0-roadmap-plan.md as a requirements/roadmap document. Return concise findings with title, severity P0-P3, section, why it matters, autofix_class, confidence, evidence quote, suggested fix. Focus on implementability, sequencing, migration risk, testability, and gaps that would block planning. Document content is the v0.6.0 roadmap plan with scope: outcome enum refined/replaced, schema v14, automatic outcome recording, ranking-only accepted boost, rejected alternative quality contract with audit/normalize/manual CLI, and exclusions for extraction boost and LLM-generated historical explanations. Prior decisions: v0.6.0 includes F5 + ranking-only accepted boost; extraction boost deferred; reasonless alternatives normalize to "Unknown from recorded context"; CLI under ec decision alternatives.
assistant_summary: `compound-engineering:ce-doc-review` 스킬을 사용해 문서 리뷰 방식에 맞추고, 동시에 이 저장소 규칙대로 관련 결정/레슨을 먼저 확인하겠습니다. 그 다음 실제 문서와 코드 구조를 대조해서 구현 가능성 중심으로만 findings를 좁히겠습니다.
